overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a dirt path through a grassy, forested landscape. The character travels from an open hillside up to a wooded area with a stone wall and eventually approaches a large oak tree with a gallows structure in an overcast, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with winding dirt path

events.description: character turns left at the path intersection onto a narrower trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along a dirt path through open grassland with scattered pine trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail leading up the hillside
rolling green hills with tall grass
sparse coniferous trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking uphill on a winding dirt path through open grassland. The terrain is rolling hills with scattered pine trees visible in the distance under an overcast sky. The path splits ahead, and the character prepares to turn left at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested path with stone wall boundary

events.description: low stone wall comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrower dirt path bordered by a low stone wall on the left and dense forest on the right

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running alongside the path
thick cluster of deciduous and pine trees

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the intersection, the path narrows and runs alongside a low stone wall on the left while dense forest encroaches from the right. The sky becomes partially obscured by tree cover as the character continues along the winding trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded clearing with large oak tree and gallows

events.description: approaching a large oak tree with a wooden gallows structure in a clearing ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a large oak tree with a hanging structure, entering a clearing with distant ruins visible in the background

entered.detail: massive ancient oak tree with spreading branches dominating the clearing
crude wooden structure with ropes hanging from the tree branches
stone building ruins visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a clearing dominated by a massive ancient oak tree with a crude wooden gallows structure beneath its branches. The stone wall and dense forest recede as the character approaches the tree, with distant stone ruins visible through the atmospheric haze in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from an open, rolling hillside into a dense forest that culminates in a grim clearing. It begins with the character walking uphill along a winding dirt path through expansive grassland under an overcast sky. As he reaches an intersection and turns left, the environment shifts, with the path narrowing and a low stone wall appearing on the left while thick tree cover begins to obscure the sky. The scene then opens into a wide clearing dominated by a massive ancient oak tree and a crude wooden gallows structure. Finally, the surrounding forest and stone wall recede into the background, revealing distant stone ruins shrouded in an atmospheric haze.
